title: Part 6 – Texte à trous : maintenance du réseau
instructions: Lisez la note de service et choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui convient pour chaque numéro.
passage:
Subject: Scheduled Network Maintenance

Dear team,

Please be informed that our network {{1}} undergo scheduled maintenance this Friday evening, from 8 p.m. to midnight.

During this time, access to email, the shared drive, and the company website {{2}} be temporarily unavailable.

{{3}}, we recommend saving any important files before 8 p.m. on Friday.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your {{4}}.

questions.explanation: La maintenance est programmée pour "this Friday evening" : futur, "will undergo".
La recommandation est une conséquence logique de l'indisponibilité annoncée : "Therefore".
